subject: [PATCH v3 04/10] fuse: use enum types for header copying

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch improves the interface for copying headers in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) implementation by introducing enum types to identify which part of the header needs to be copied. This change will simplify both kernel-space and user-space header addresses copying when buffer rings are added, making it easier to manage and maintain the code.
